title: Flowers Bouquet Building Sets for Adult, 1070 PCS Artificial Flower Building Blocks, DIY Kit with 10 Kinds of Flower Plants, Valentines Day Gifts for Her Wife, Botanical Collection Home Decor(No Vase)
seller_info_text: Dongguan DaYehu dianzi shangwu youxian gongsi
features: 🌺 STUNNING ASSORTMENT OF FLOWERS: This charming artificial flower building blocks kit features 10 unique flowers, including camellias, roses, and alstroemeria, all pieced together from 1,070 blocks. Each flower displays intricate detail and vibrant colours, ensuring a lifelike appearance that will brighten up any space in your home. Whether placed on a desk or shelf, this bouquet of flowers will bring a touch of natural elegance without the maintenance required by real plants.

🌺 ANTI-ALLERGY AND LONG LASTING VIBRANT VIBRANCY: Enjoy the beauty of flowers without the hassle of maintenance or allergies. This bouquet is a perfect solution for those who love floral decorations but are sensitive to pollen. The colourfast design ensures that your flowers stay beautiful all year round, bringing you continuous joy and charm, ideal for decorating your bedroom, office or living room.

🌺 SAFE, PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: Flowers bouquet building setis made of high quality, non-toxic materials, designed for safe use by children and adults. Each part is easy to assemble, allowing you to be as creative as you want. The product comes with detailed instructions so you can build the bouquet alone or share the fun with your family, making it a participatory project that promotes bonding and creativity.

🌺INFINITE CREATIVE POSSIBILITIES: Adjustable petals and stems allow you to customise the flower arrangement as you see fit. You can mix and match styles, create different floral displays, and change the angle of the flowers and foliage to suit your décor. This DIY experience not only inspires your creativity, but also allows you to design stunning bouquets that reflect your unique taste and personality.

🌺 PERFECT GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION: Surprise a loved one with this unique botanical collection building block toy, perfect for birthdays, holidays, or any other occasion! Ideal for mothers, daughters, friends or anyone who appreciates beautiful decorations, this set makes a thoughtful and memorable gift. The charm and beauty of this flower set will undoubtedly bring joy and warmth to anyone's home, making it a memorable gift.
description: Product Description 1070PCS Unique Flower Bouquet Building Set - Includes A Nice Gift Box Features 10 different artificial decorative flowers and a leaf to create a beautiful display in your office or home. Comes with adjustable stem lengths, which means you can mix and match the bouquet the way you want! Includes a beautiful gift box and detailed instructions, is the best choice for gifts. 10 EXQUISITE FLOWERS FREE TO MATCH AND DIY GREAT IDEAL GIFT CHOICE
